data.title: Bitcoin Seesaws as Hot Jobs Report Extinguishes Rate Cut Hopes
data.description:
The price of Bitcoin wavered after a hotter-than-expected jobs report pointed to a resilient U. S. labor market, squashing rate cut hopes.
source: https://decrypt.co/328482/bitcoin-seesaws-hot-jobs-report-extinguishes-rate-cut-hopes

data.title: Bitcoin's Price Forecast for July 2025 Shows Optimism
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from the decentralized prediction market Polymarket indicates that users are optimistic about Bitcoin reaching the $115,000 price range by July 2025. The probability for this prediction stands at 60%, marking an 8% increase from the previous day. The 'Buy Yes' price for this range is 60 cents, while 'Buy No' is priced at 41 cents, with a total trading volume of $252,000.

The next most favored price range is $120,000, with a prediction probability of 33% and a 'Buy Yes' price of 34 cents. The total trading volume for this range is $413,000. The $130,000 range has a prediction probability of 8%, with similarly high liquidity and a trading volume of $432,000.

In contrast, the market sentiment for Bitcoin falling below $100,000 is pessimistic. The prediction probabilities for the $90,000, $95,000, and $100,000 ranges have decreased to 8%, 19%, and 38%, respectively. Overall, Polymarket investors exhibit optimism, with price predictions shifting significantly towards the $110,000 to $120,000 range.

data.title: In the first half of the year, stablecoins accounted for 74.6% of the total institutional OTC transactions, of which USDC trading volume increased 29 times year-on-year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Finery Markets' latest report shows that stablecoins accounted for 74.6% of institutional OTC trading volume in the first half of 2025, up from 46% in the same period last year and 23% in 2023. Among them, USDC performed particularly well, with trading volume increasing 29 times year-on-year under the EU MiCA regulations. The report is based on an analysis of 4.1 million transaction data from the platform from January to June. Institutional transactions showed three major trends: overall OTC spot trading volume increased by 112.6% year-on-year, stablecoin trading volume increased by 154%, and the liquidity of cryptocurrency and stablecoin trading pairs surged by 277.4%, far exceeding the 48.5% growth rate of fiat currency trading pairs. In addition to mainstream assets, altcoins such as Cardano and Solana account for a total of 16.7% of the market share. Analysts say this makes stablecoins the fastest growing sector in the cryptocurrency market. (The Block)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Issues New Sanctions on Iran, According to Market Reports
data.description: Key Takeaways:U.S. Treasury Department reportedly announced fresh sanctions on Iran on July 3.News surfaced via the Treasury’s website, as reported by TechFlow and Jinshi Data.The sanctions could impact regional stability and market sentiment, especially in energy and crypto sectors.According to market updates from TechFlow, citing Jinshi Data, the U.S. Treasury Department issued a new round of sanctions on Iran on July 3, 2025.

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin is approaching a new high, but traders are still bearish, and a surge in shorts may trigger a potential "short squeeze"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coindesk analyst Oliver Knight said that although the price of Bitcoin has exceeded $110,000 and is close to its all-time high, traders are still bearish, and the long-short ratio has dropped significantly, from 1.223 (longs dominate) to 0.858 (shorts dominate). Data shows that short open interest has risen from $32 billion to $35 billion, indicating that funds flowing into bearish positions are increasing, reflecting the market's lack of confidence in the continued rise of Bitcoin. At present, Bitcoin is still fluctuating in the range of $100,000 to $110,000. Technical indicators such as RSI show bearish divergences, and traders use short-term strategies in this range for arbitrage operations. With the increase in short positions, there is also a potential bullish scenario in the market: short squeeze. If Bitcoin breaks through its historical highs, triggering the forced liquidation point and stop loss of shorts, it may quickly push up buying pressure, thereby driving prices further up. (CoinDesk)

data.title: US adds more jobs than expected in June, unemployment rate dips
data.description:
The United States added 147,000 jobs in June, blowing past forecasts as public schools went on a hiring spree while most other industries dragged. The new employment data, released Thursday by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, showed a drop in the unemployment rate to 4. 1%, with fewer people out of work and fewer actively looking. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-adds-more-jobs-than-expected-in-june/

data.title: Metaplanet Shareholders Double in Three Months
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cointelegraph reports that Metaplanet's shareholder count has reached 128,073 individuals, marking a more than twofold increase over the past three months.

data.title: Bitmine Immersion's Stock Surges Amid Major Private Funding
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bitmine Immersion (BMNR) has seen its stock price rise significantly, expanding by 64.2% to a current price of $96.06. Over the past week, the stock has surged by more than 2117%.

The company recently announced the completion of a substantial $250 million private funding round. The funds raised are primarily intended for increasing their holdings in Ethereum, which they plan to use as a core reserve asset. Additionally, Bitmine Immersion will continue to focus on its main business of Bitcoin mining.

data.title: Bitcoin Investors Show Strong Long-Term Commitment Amid Price Surge
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Glassnode indicates a continued decline in Bitcoin's Liveliness metric, suggesting that investors are generally opting to hold rather than spend their assets. Unlike previous instances where Bitcoin reached historical highs and saw significant profit-taking, the current price increase is marked by investors' preference to maintain their holdings, demonstrating a robust long-term belief as prices approach high levels. The decrease in the Liveliness metric is considered an important signal of stable on-chain holding behavior.

The current position of the whale: BTC 40x short position: holding 151.84, worth $16.68 million, opening price $106,697.3; ETH 25x short position: holding 4446.81, worth $11.56 million, opening price $2452.03.

data.title: Bank of England Governor warns: Stablecoins threaten public trust in money
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey warned that the rise of stablecoins could undermine public trust in currency as experts warned of the threat posed by the large-scale application of cryptocurrencies backed by the US dollar. In a speech released on Thursday, Bailey said that central banks need to "pay close attention" to innovations in the payment field to prevent them from introducing new vulnerabilities to the monetary system. (Bloomberg)
